fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence. Each frame wraps a pixmap and specifies how long the frame should be displayed. Use the constructors that accept `SKBitmap` or `SKImage` for convenience — they peek the underlying pixel data without copying.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap2, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
};
var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using SKData? data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, options);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP image, including the pixel data and display duration.

params.bitmap: The source bitmap whose pixels will be used for this frame. The bitmap must remain valid for the lifetime of this frame.
params.duration: The length of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> with the specified bitmap and display duration.

params.image: The source image whose pixels will be used for this frame. The image must be raster-backed and remain valid for the lifetime of this frame.
params.duration: The length of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> with the specified image and display duration.

params.pixmap: The source pixmap containing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The length of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> with the specified pixmap and display duration.

fields.value: The amount of time this frame is displayed during animation playback.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the display duration of this frame.

fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> containing the pixel data for this frame.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
